name: Ultimate PPL 5x
description: Jeff Nippard's Ultimate Push Pull Legs System - 5x/week

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.notes: Set up a comfortable arch, quick pause on the chest and explode up on each rep

exercises.name: Larsen Press
exercises.notes: Shoulder blades still retracted and depressed. Slight arch in upper back. Zero leg drive.

exercises.name: Standing Dumbbell Arnold Press
exercises.notes: Start with your elbows in front of you and palms facing in. Rotate the dumbbells so that your palms face forward as you press.

exercises.name: A1. Press-Around
exercises.notes: Brace with your non-working arm, squeeze your pecs by pressing the cable across your body

exercises.name: A2. Pec Static Stretch 30s
exercises.notes: Hold a pec stretch for 30 seconds. The stretch should be held at about a 7/10 intensity.

exercises.name: Cross-Body Cable Y-Raise (Side Delt)
exercises.notes: Think about swinging the cable out and up as if "drawing a sword" from your side

exercises.name: Squeeze-Only Triceps Pressdown + Stretch-Only Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Do the second half of the ROM for pressdowns ("the squeeze") and the first half of the ROM for overhead extensions ("the stretch")

exercises.name: N1-Style Cross-Body Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Extend your triceps with your arm more out to the side than a regular pressdown. Feel the stretch as the cable moves across your torso

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown (Feeder Sets)
exercises.notes: Do 4 feeder sets of 10 reps by gradually building the weight up from set to set. Set 1 is pretty light (RPE 4-5). Set 2 is a little heavier (RPE 6-7). Set 3 is a little heavier again (RPE 7-8). Set 4 is your hard set: try to hit failure at 10 reps on this last set.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown (Failure Set)
exercises.notes: After hitting failure at ~10 reps, do a dropset. Strip the weight back ~30-50% and do another 5 reps with nice and controlled technique

exercises.name: Omni-Grip Machine Chest-Supported Row
exercises.notes: Use 3 different grips for the 3 working sets (ideally going from wider to closer)

exercises.name: A1. Bottom-Half DB Lat Pullover
exercises.notes: Do DB lat pullovers, but cut out the top half of the ROM (stay entirely in the stretched aspect of the lift)

exercises.name: A2. Lat Static Stretch 30s
exercises.notes: Hold a lat stretch for 30 seconds. The stretch should be held at about a 7/10 intensity.

exercises.name: Omni-Direction Face Pull
exercises.notes:
1st set: low-to-high
2nd set: mid-range
3rd set: high-to-low

exercises.name: EZ-Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on contracting your biceps, minimize torso momentum

exercises.name: Bottom-Half Preacher Curl
exercises.notes: Do preacher curls, but cut out the top half of the ROM (stay entirely in the stretched aspect of the lift)

exercises.name: Squat
exercises.notes: Sit back and down, keep your upper back tight to the bar

exercises.name: Pause Squat (Back off)
exercises.notes: Drop the weight by ~25% from your top set. 2 second pause. Sit back and down, keep your upper back tight to the bar

exercises.name: Barbell RDL
exercises.notes: Maintain a neutral lower back, set your hips back, don't allow your spine to round

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.notes: Take medium strides, minimize the amount you push off your rear leg

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your hamstrings to move the weight

exercises.name: Leg Press Toe Press
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: Decline Plate-Weighted Crunch
exercises.notes: Hold a plate or DB to your chest and crunch hard!

exercises.name: Pull-Up
exercises.notes: 1.5x shoulder width grip, pull your chest to the bar

exercises.name: Close-Grip Barbell Incline Press
exercises.notes: Use ~45° incline and a grip width just outside shoulder width

exercises.name: Kroc Row
exercises.notes: Kroc rows are basically just a dumbbell row with mild cheating and a slightly more upright posture. Don't be afraid to go heavy and use straps if your grip is limiting

exercises.name: Eccentric-Accentuated Cable Lateral Raise, Constant-Tension Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: First 5 reps: 5-second lowering phase, last 15 reps constant tension (no pausing at the bottom or top)

exercises.name: N1-Style Cross-Body Bicep Curl
exercises.notes: Curl across your body with your arm out to the side at ~60°

exercises.name: Diamond Pushup
exercises.notes: Place your hands close together on the ground so that they form a diamond shape and do as many pushups as possible with a smooth tempo

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: Brace your lats, chest tall, pull the slack out of the bar before lifting

exercises.name: Stiff-Leg Deadlift
exercises.notes: Think about doing a high-hip conventional deadlift with a slight bend in the knees

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Medium width feet placement on the platform, don't allow your lower back to round

exercises.name: Glute Ham Raise
exercises.notes: Keep your hips straight, do Nordic ham curls if no GHR machine

exercises.name: Slow-Eccentric Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Control the weight with a 3-4 second negative

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: Roman Chair Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Don't swing your legs at the bottom, minimize momentum, tuck your knees towards your chest if lifting your legs straight out is too challenging

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.notes: Set up a comfortable arch, quick pause on the chest and explode up on each rep

exercises.name: Larsen Press
exercises.notes: Shoulder blades still retracted and depressed. Slight arch in upper back. Zero leg drive.

exercises.notes: Set up a comfortable arch, quick pause on the chest and explode up on each rep

exercises.name: Larsen Press
exercises.notes: Shoulder blades still retracted and depressed. Slight arch in upper back. Zero leg drive.

exercises.name: Standing Dumbbell Arnold Press
exercises.notes: Start with your elbows in front of you and palms facing in. Rotate the dumbbells so that your palms face forward as you press.

exercises.name: A1. Press-Around
exercises.notes: Brace with your non-working arm, squeeze your pecs by pressing the cable across your body

exercises.name: A2. Pec Static Stretch 30s
exercises.notes: Hold a pec stretch for 30 seconds. The stretch should be held at about a 7/10 intensity.

exercises.name: Cross-Body Cable Y-Raise (Side Delt)
exercises.notes: Think about swinging the cable out and up as if "drawing a sword" from your side

exercises.name: Squeeze-Only Triceps Pressdown + Stretch-Only Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Do the second half of the ROM for pressdowns ("the squeeze") and the first half of the ROM for overhead extensions ("the stretch")

exercises.name: N1-Style Cross-Body Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Extend your triceps with your arm more out to the side than a regular pressdown. Feel the stretch as the cable moves across your torso

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown (Feeder Sets)
exercises.notes: Do 4 feeder sets of 10 reps by gradually building the weight up from set to set. Set 1 is pretty light (RPE 4-5). Set 2 is a little heavier (RPE 6-7). Set 3 is a little heavier again (RPE 7-8). Set 4 is your hard set: try to hit failure at 10 reps on this last set.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown (Failure Set)
exercises.notes: After hitting failure at ~10 reps, do a dropset. Strip the weight back ~30-50% and do another 5 reps with nice and controlled technique

exercises.name: Omni-Grip Machine Chest-Supported Row
exercises.notes: Use 3 different grips for the 3 working sets (ideally going from wider to closer)

exercises.name: A1. Bottom-Half DB Lat Pullover
exercises.notes: Do DB lat pullovers, but cut out the top half of the ROM (stay entirely in the stretched aspect of the lift)

exercises.name: A2. Lat Static Stretch 30s
exercises.notes: Hold a lat stretch for 30 seconds. The stretch should be held at about a 7/10 intensity.

exercises.name: Omni-Direction Face Pull
exercises.notes:
1st set: low-to-high
2nd set: mid-range
3rd set: high-to-low

exercises.name: EZ-Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on contracting your biceps, minimize torso momentum

exercises.name: Bottom-Half Preacher Curl
exercises.notes: Do preacher curls, but cut out the top half of the ROM (stay entirely in the stretched aspect of the lift)

exercises.name: Squat
exercises.notes: Sit back and down, keep your upper back tight to the bar

exercises.name: Pause Squat (Back off)
exercises.notes: Drop the weight by ~25% from your top set. 2 second pause. Sit back and down, keep your upper back tight to the bar

exercises.name: Barbell RDL
exercises.notes: Maintain a neutral lower back, set your hips back, don't allow your spine to round

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.notes: Take medium strides, minimize the amount you push off your rear leg

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your hamstrings to move the weight

exercises.name: Leg Press Toe Press
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: Decline Plate-Weighted Crunch
exercises.notes: Hold a plate or DB to your chest and crunch hard!

exercises.name: Pull-Up
exercises.notes: 1.5x shoulder width grip, pull your chest to the bar

exercises.name: Close-Grip Barbell Incline Press
exercises.notes: Use ~45° incline and a grip width just outside shoulder width

exercises.name: Kroc Row
exercises.notes: Kroc rows are basically just a dumbbell row with mild cheating and a slightly more upright posture. Don't be afraid to go heavy and use straps if your grip is limiting

exercises.name: Eccentric-Accentuated Cable Lateral Raise, Constant-Tension Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: First 5 reps: 5-second lowering phase, last 15 reps constant tension (no pausing at the bottom or top)

exercises.name: N1-Style Cross-Body Bicep Curl
exercises.notes: Curl across your body with your arm out to the side at ~60°

exercises.name: Diamond Pushup
exercises.notes: Place your hands close together on the ground so that they form a diamond shape and do as many pushups as possible with a smooth tempo

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: Brace your lats, chest tall, pull the slack out of the bar before lifting

exercises.name: Stiff-Leg Deadlift
exercises.notes: Think about doing a high-hip conventional deadlift with a slight bend in the knees

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Medium width feet placement on the platform, don't allow your lower back to round

exercises.name: Glute Ham Raise
exercises.notes: Keep your hips straight, do Nordic ham curls if no GHR machine

exercises.name: Slow-Eccentric Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Control the weight with a 3-4 second negative

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: Roman Chair Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Don't swing your legs at the bottom, minimize momentum, tuck your knees towards your chest if lifting your legs straight out is too challenging

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.notes: Set up a comfortable arch, quick pause on the chest and explode up on each rep

exercises.name: High-Incline Smith Machine Press
exercises.notes: Set the bench at a 45-60 degree incline, touch the bar to your upper chest with control

exercises.name: Egyptian Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Lean away from the cable. Focus on squeezing your delts.

exercises.name: Overhead Cable Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Do both arms at once, resist the negative

exercises.name: Cable Triceps Kickback
exercises.notes: Lean slightly forward, lock your elbow behind your torso (shoulder hyperextension)

exercises.name: Neutral-Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Pull your elbows down against your sides

exercises.name: Pendlay Row
exercises.notes: Initiate the movement by squeezing your shoulder blades together, pull to your lower chest, avoid using momentum

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck
exercises.notes: Swing the weight "out", not "back"

exercises.name: EZ-Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Arc the bar "out" not "up", focus on squeezing your biceps

exercises.name: Hammer Cheat Curl
exercises.notes: You can use slight momentum on the concentric, but control the eccentric with your elbows stationary

exercises.name: Squat or Machine Squat
exercises.notes: Sit back and down, keep your upper back tight to the bar

exercises.name: Barbell RDL
exercises.notes: Maintain a neutral lower back, set your hips back, don't allow your spine to round

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your quads to make the weight move.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Round your back as you crunch

exercises.name: Wide-Grip Pull-Up
exercises.notes: Use ~1.5x shoulder width grip. Add weight or use assistance as needed to hit RPE. Keep form as consistent as possible.

exercises.name: Seated DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Bring the dumbbells all the way down, keep your torso upright

exercises.name: Close-Grip Seated Cable Row
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your shoulder blades together, drive your elbows down and back.

exercises.name: Weighted Dip
exercises.notes: Tuck your elbows at 45°, lean your torso forward 15°, shoulder width or slightly wider grip

exercises.name: Machine Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your lateral delt to move the weight

exercises.name: Alternating DB Curl
exercises.notes: Alternate arms with each curl: do 1 rep with your right arm, one rep with your left arm. Repeat until you reach 4-6 reps with each arm.

exercises.name: Triceps Pressdown
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your triceps to move the weight

exercises.name: Hack Squat
exercises.notes: Allow your knees to come forward (past your toes), focus the tension on your quads

exercises.name: Dumbbell Walking Lunge
exercises.notes: Do 4-6 reps with each leg (10-12 total strides). Straps may be helpful if your grip becomes limiting.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your hamstrings to move the weight

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: Decline Plate-Weighted Crunch
exercises.notes: Hold a plate or DB to your chest and crunch hard!

exercises.notes: Set up a comfortable arch, quick pause on the chest and explode up on each rep

exercises.name: High-Incline Smith Machine Press
exercises.notes: Set the bench at a 45-60 degree incline, touch the bar to your upper chest with control

exercises.notes: Lean away from the cable. Focus on squeezing your delts.

exercises.name: Overhead Cable Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Do both arms at once, resist the negative

exercises.name: Cable Triceps Kickback
exercises.notes: Lean slightly forward, lock your elbow behind your torso (shoulder hyperextension)

exercises.notes: Pull your elbows down against your sides

exercises.name: Seated DB Shoulder Press

exercises.name: Triceps Pressdown
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your triceps to move the weight

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: Can pull sumo or conventional, go with whatever variation you are stronger with

exercises.name: Dumbbell Walking Lunge
exercises.notes: Do 4-6 reps with each leg (10-12 total strides). Straps may be helpful if your grip becomes limiting.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your hamstrings to move the weight

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: Decline Plate-Weighted Crunch
exercises.notes: Hold a plate or DB to your chest and crunch hard!

exercises.name: Low Incline DB Press
exercises.notes: 15° bench angle, tuck your elbows on the negative, flare as you press

exercises.name: Machine Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Don't stop in between reps, keep smooth and controlled tension on the delts

exercises.name: Cable Crossover Ladder
exercises.notes: Do one set with low cable position, one set with medium-height cable position, and one height with a high cable position

exercises.name: A1: Lean-In Constant Tension DB Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Lean into a bench and do lateral raises. Keep tension - don't rest your arm against your side at the bottom.

exercises.name: A2: Side Delt Static Stretch (30s)
exercises.notes: Hold a side delt stretch for 30 seconds. The stretch should be held at about a 7/10 intensity.

exercises.name: Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Do both arms at once, resist the negative

exercises.name: Med-Ball Close Grip Push Up
exercises.notes: Place your hands on a medicine ball and do smooth, controlled pushups

exercises.name: 1-Arm Half Kneeling Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Keep chest tall, keep elbow tucked in close to your torso, focus on squeezing your lat to move the weight

exercises.name: Omni-Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: One set wide grip (overhand), 1 set middle grip (overhand), 1 set close grip (underhand)

exercises.name: Machine Low Row
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your shoulder blades together on each rep

exercises.name: Cable Shrug-In
exercises.notes: Set up two cable handles low and shrug up and in. Squeeze your upper traps to move the weight.

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck
exercises.notes: Swing the weight "out", not "back"

exercises.name: EZ-Bar Curl (Heavy)
exercises.notes: Arc the bar "out" not "up", focus on squeezing your biceps

exercises.name: A1: EZ-Bar Modified Bicep 21's
exercises.notes: 7 reps seated, 7 reps standing full ROM, 7 reps bottom-half curls

exercises.name: A2: Bicep Static Stretch (30s)
exercises.notes: Hold a bicep stretch for 30 seconds. The stretch should be held at about a 7/10 intensity.

exercises.name: Front Squat
exercises.notes: These will be challenging, let's push! Don't go so heavy that you miss reps. Be humble with your weight and focus on keeping your torso upright

exercises.name: Dumbbell RDL
exercises.notes: Emphasize the stretch in your hamstrings, prevent your lower back from rounding

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.notes: Take medium strides, minimize the amount you push off your rear leg

exercises.name: Slow Seated Leg Curl (3 up, 3 down)
exercises.notes: Lift with a slow tempo. The positive should take 3 seconds and the negative should take 3 seconds.

exercises.name: Leg Press Toe Press
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: LLPT Plank
exercises.notes: Contract your glutes and position your elbows under your eyes to make the plank more difficult

exercises.name: Bench Press (Top Set)
exercises.notes: Set up a comfortable arch, quick pause on the chest and explode up on each rep

exercises.name: Bench Press (Back Off AMRAP)
exercises.notes: Use ~60% of the weight you used on your top set and do it for as many reps as possible. You should be in the range of 10-20+ reps on this set! Use a spotter and safety bars!

exercises.name: Pull-Up
exercises.notes: 6 cluster sets: 3 reps, rest 15s, repeat 6x. Keep form smooth and controlled.

exercises.name: Standing Dumbbell Arnold Press
exercises.notes: Start with your elbows in front of you and palms facing in. Rotate the dumbbells so that your palms face forward as you press.

exercises.name: Wide-Grip Cable Row
exercises.notes: 10 cluster sets: 3 reps, rest 15s, repeat 10x. Keep form tight.

exercises.name: Triceps Pressdown
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your triceps to move the weight

exercises.name: Bayesian Cable Curl
exercises.notes: Keep your elbow behind your torso throughout the range of motion, focus on squeezing your bicep. Sets are per arm

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: Brace your lats, chest tall, pull the slack out of the bar before lifting

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Medium width feet placement on the platform, don't allow your lower back to round

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your quads to make the weight move

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your hamstrings to make the weight move

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: Corpse Crunch
exercises.notes: Clear your upper back off the floor when you crunch, hold for 1-2 seconds and then go back down. Don't yank with your neck.

exercises.name: Low Incline DB Press
exercises.notes: 15° bench angle, tuck your elbows on the negative, flare as you press

exercises.name: Machine Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Don't stop in between reps, keep smooth and controlled tension on the delts

exercises.notes: Do one set with low cable position, one set with medium-height cable position, and one height with a high cable position

exercises.notes: 6 cluster sets: 3 reps, rest 15s, repeat 6x. Keep form smooth and controlled.

exercises.name: Standing Dumbbell Arnold Press
exercises.notes: Start with your elbows in front of you and palms facing in. Rotate the dumbbells so that your palms face forward as you press.

exercises.name: Wide-Grip Cable Row
exercises.notes: 10 cluster sets: 3 reps, rest 15s, repeat 10x. Keep form tight.

exercises.name: Triceps Pressdown
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your triceps to move the weight

exercises.name: Bayesian Cable Curl
exercises.notes: Keep your elbow behind your torso throughout the range of motion, focus on squeezing your bicep. Sets are per arm

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: Brace your lats, chest tall, pull the slack out of the bar before lifting

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Medium width feet placement on the platform, don't allow your lower back to round

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your quads to make the weight move

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your hamstrings to make the weight move

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: Corpse Crunch
exercises.notes: Clear your upper back off the floor when you crunch, hold for 1-2 seconds and then go back down. Don't yank with your neck.

exercises.name: Low Incline DB Press
exercises.notes: 15° bench angle, tuck your elbows on the negative, flare as you press

exercises.name: Machine Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Don't stop in between reps, keep smooth and controlled tension on the delts

exercises.name: Cable Crossover Ladder
exercises.notes: Do one set with low cable position, one set with medium-height cable position, and one height with a high cable position

exercises.name: A1: Lean-In Constant Tension DB Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Lean into a bench and do lateral raises. Keep tension - don't rest your arm against your side at the bottom.

exercises.name: A2: Side Delt Static Stretch (30s)
exercises.notes: Hold a side delt stretch for 30 seconds. The stretch should be held at about a 7/10 intensity.

exercises.name: Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Do both arms at once, resist the negative

exercises.name: Med-Ball Close Grip Push Up
exercises.notes: Place your hands on a medicine ball and do smooth, controlled pushups

exercises.name: 1-Arm Half Kneeling Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Keep chest tall, keep elbow tucked in close to your torso, focus on squeezing your lat to move the weight

exercises.name: Omni-Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: One set wide grip (overhand), 1 set middle grip (overhand), 1 set close grip (underhand)

exercises.name: Machine Low Row
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your shoulder blades together on each rep

exercises.name: Cable Shrug-In
exercises.notes: Set up two cable handles low and shrug up and in. Squeeze your upper traps to move the weight.

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck
exercises.notes: Swing the weight "out", not "back"

exercises.name: EZ-Bar Curl (Heavy)
exercises.notes: Arc the bar "out" not "up", focus on squeezing your biceps

exercises.name: A1: EZ-Bar Modified Bicep 21's
exercises.notes: 7 reps seated, 7 reps standing full ROM, 7 reps bottom-half curls

exercises.name: A2: Bicep Static Stretch (30s)
exercises.notes: Hold a bicep stretch for 30 seconds. The stretch should be held at about a 7/10 intensity.

exercises.name: Front Squat
exercises.notes: Stay light, keep your torso upright

exercises.name: Dumbbell RDL
exercises.notes: Emphasize the stretch in your hamstrings, prevent your lower back from rounding

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.notes: Take medium strides, minimize the amount you push off your rear leg

exercises.name: Slow Seated Leg Curl (3 up, 3 down)
exercises.notes: Lift with a slow tempo. The positive should take 3 seconds and the negative should take 3 seconds.

exercises.name: Leg Press Toe Press
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: LLPT Plank
exercises.notes: Contract your glutes and position your elbows under your eyes to make the plank more difficult

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.notes: Set up a comfortable arch, quick pause on the chest and explode up on each rep

exercises.name: Pull-Up
exercises.notes: 6 cluster sets: 3 reps, rest 15s, repeat 6x. Keep form smooth and controlled.

exercises.name: Standing Dumbbell Arnold Press
exercises.notes: Start with your elbows in front of you and palms facing in. Rotate the dumbbells so that your palms face forward as you press.

exercises.name: Wide-Grip Cable Row
exercises.notes: 10 cluster sets: 3 reps, rest 15s, repeat 10x. Keep form tight.

exercises.name: Triceps Pressdown
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your triceps to move the weight

exercises.name: Bayesian Cable Curl
exercises.notes: Keep your elbow behind your torso throughout the range of motion, focus on squeezing your bicep. Sets are per arm

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: Brace your lats, chest tall, pull the slack out of the bar before lifting

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Medium width feet placement on the platform, don't allow your lower back to round

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your quads to make the weight move

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your hamstrings to make the weight move

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: Corpse Crunch
exercises.notes: Clear your upper back off the floor when you crunch, hold for 1-2 seconds and then go back down. Don't yank with your neck.
